description_long: This is a single-story bungalow surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and several mature trees, creating a suburban residential feel. The building features a flat roof and light-colored exterior walls, with large windows on multiple sides allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front of the bungalow is accessible via a paved walkway leading to the main entrance, which is flanked by landscaped greenery and a small garden bed. The rear and sides of the house are bordered by additional trees and shrubs, providing privacy and shade. The interior layout is open and modern, with visible furnishings such as a kitchen, dining area, and living space. The overall setting suggests a peaceful, family-oriented home in a quiet neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and surrounded by trees and landscaped gardens. The home features an open layout and is set within a suburban green lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved walkway, and landscaped garden with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, light exterior walls, and open interior layout with visible furnishings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large windows, a grassy backyard, and dense tree coverage for privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite front view with driveway access, more trees, and a partial glimpse of the interior through the windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large windows on multiple sides
